zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Allard於大約1683年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯時，她的父親James Allard Sr35歲，母親Honor Wallis23歲。她於1708年8月12日與Elias Parcher在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1747年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Allard于大约1683年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆波斯姆斯时，她的父亲James Allard Sr35岁，母亲Honor Wallis23岁。她于1708年8月12日与Elias Parcher在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾斯特拉福德多福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1747年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆格林藍德享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Allard was born about 1683, in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, James Allard Sr, was 35 and her mother, Honor Wallis, was 23. She married Elias Parcher on 12 August 1708, in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1747, in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Allard est née environ 1683, à Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, James Allard Sr, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Honor Wallis, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Elias Parcher le 12 août 1708, à Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1747, à Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Grace Allard um 1683 in Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater James Allard Sr 35 und ihre Mutter Honor Wallis 23. Sie hat am 12. August 1708 in Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America Elias Parcher geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1747 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Allard è nata il circa 1683 nel Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, sua padre, James Allard Sr, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Honor Wallis, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Elias Parcher il 12 agosto 1708, nel Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1747, nel Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Grace Allardが約1683年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムポルトスモウスで生まれた時，父James Allard Srは35歳，母Honor Wallisは23歳であった。1708年8月12日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアストラフォードドバーでElias Parcherと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1747年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムグレエンランドで65歳で死去した。

ko.Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버

ko.Greenland, New Hampshire: 미국 뉴햄프셔 주 록잉함 그린랜드 그린랜드 스태티언
ko.lifeSummary: Grace Allard(이)가 대략 1683년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 포츠모우스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Allard Sr(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Honor Wallis(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1708년 8월 12일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 스트래퍼드 도버에서 Elias Parcher(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1747년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 그린랜드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Allard nasceu aproximadamente 1683, em Portsmouth, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, James Allard Sr, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Honor Wallis, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Elias Parcher em 12 de agosto de 1708, em Dover, Strafford, New Hampshire, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1747, em Greenland, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Allard родилась около 1683 г. в местности порцмоут, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени James Allard Sr было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Honor Wallis, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Elias Parcher 12 августа 1708 г. в местности довир, страффорд, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1747 г. в местности гринланд, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет.
